acceptance_criteria:
1. FieldSpec, ConstraintSpec, ConstraintKind types defined
2. Typed Signature trait with Input/Output associated types
3. PredictError with Lm/Parse/Conversion variants
4. ParseError with MissingField/ExtractionFailed/CoercionFailed/AssertFailed/Multiple variants
5. CallResult<O> with field_flags(), field_checks(), field_raw() accessors
6. All types exported from core/mod.rs
title: Phase 1: Define typed Signature trait and core types
